rationale: Review 1's findings are directly verifiable in the diff: fiberHomeomorph_one genuinely lacks @[simp] despite being a normal-form lemma, and the two wrapper lemmas are provably just .mp/.mpr of the existing iff. Review 2 claims the public instances exceed roadmap Stage 0.4 scope, but the module docstring explicitly declares this file IS Stage 0.4 work packaging those exact definitions, so acting on Review 2 would undo the file's stated purpose.
